# GitHub Copilot — custom instructions

This repo is unashamedly AI-generated. Keep it working *and* trustworthy to install.

👉 **Your standing operating manual is [../ai-does-good-shit.md](../ai-does-good-shit.md)
(repo root). Read it and follow it on every task.** It is the single source of truth
for how to behave here. This file does not repeat it.

Copilot-specific: agent terminal commands are NOT auto-approved — see
[../.vscode/settings.json](../.vscode/settings.json).

Code style: vanilla JS Manifest V3 Chrome extensions, no build step; match existing
idiom and the security depth of the per-extension READMEs.
